query:
-- 获取默认颜色ID
SET @defaultColorId = (
  SELECT mc.id 
  FROM material_colors mc
  JOIN material_boards mb ON mc.boardId = mb.id
  JOIN material_suppliers ms ON mb.supplierId = ms.id
  WHERE mc.colorCode = 'DEFAULT-001' AND ms.code = 'SYS-DEFAULT'
  LIMIT 1
);

-- 更新所有materialColorId为NULL的批次
UPDATE product_variants 
SET materialColorId = @defaultColorId 
WHERE materialColorId IS NULL;

-- 查询更新结果
SELECT COUNT(*) as updatedCount FROM product_variants WHERE materialColorId = @defaultColorId;
